cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the provided text. The question asks about the purpose of the writer. It's true that we are getting to know more and more, and we actually live in 'the information age'. Our human vanity makes us believe that we really have to know everything! Surprisingly, we do not have this ability. The question 'what is happening in the Bermuda Triangle' is the very proof." Then it provides examples of mysterious events in the Bermuda Triangle. The last paragraph says: "Maybe we will just have to wait to go to Heaven and ask the One who made it. The answer will surely be a satisfying one!"
